notes: v16 seed16 changed only the uniform write/expected byte from 0xa5 to 0x5a relative to the v15 wrapper-level byte-capture topology.
The bitstream routed with overused=0 at router iteration 21 and timing passed.
Board readback stayed at status=0xd0 with calib_seen_cycle=0 and ack_count=0 on initial read, reread, and after one reprogram retry.
This run does not classify the 0x3d read-byte mismatch; it instead shows that this small data-pattern/topology perturbation can lose the previously useful calibration gate.
